name: nassau
long_description:
### Description
* Three separate match play bets: front nine, back nine, and overall 18.
* Lower net score wins each hole. Ties are halved.
* Each bet is settled independently — you can win the front, lose the back, and halve overall.
* When a player falls behind by the press trigger (default 2 down) on any bet, a press is automatically created for that bet.
### Press Bets
* Presses fire independently on each of the three bets.
* Press amount and scope are configurable (fixed or doubling, same scope or rest of nine/round).
